title: Is there a way to have the GitHub Integration for the work management product?
excerpt: Monday is fabulous! In the business I work for, we would like to have the opportunity to integrate GitHub into the Work Management product.  I see that it is available for other Monday.com products, but we were guided to…

posts.author: MGoodman (Michelle Goodman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday is fabulous! In the business I work for, we would like to have the opportunity to integrate GitHub into the Work Management product. I see that it is available for other Monday.com products, but we were guided to this thread to add a request/suggestion for this feature.

Thank you!!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @MGoodman ,
Could you please describe a bit your case on why you need Github on work management and what details you need to see there?
